Perinatal Hepatitis B Prevention Program 
This site contains resources for PHBPP staff at the state, local, and territorial levels. 
Prevention of Hepatitis B Virus Infection in the United States 
This MMWR contains recommendations from the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP) on prevention of hepatitis B virus infection in the United States. 
Child and Adolescent Immunization Schedule by Age (Addendum updated August 7, 2025) 
Guide health care providers in determining recommended vaccines for each age group.

Guidelines for Standing Orders in Labor & Delivery & Nursery Units 
This document contains recommendations to prevent transmission of HBV to newborns.
